creator: nbe@renzel.net
text:
(In reply to Trond.Endrestol from comment #21)

you're right; I don't have that file on my older system, too. So this file does not matter.

I'm out off ideas here, sorry; you'll have to clean "/usr/obj" before building world or have to use the "OSVERSION" workaround in "/usr/local/etc/pkg.conf"...
